case_title: SARRA BAILEY VS. APARNA SUBRAMANIAN, DDS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER---KARINA ROBERTS. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAILEY, SARRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT APARNA SUBRAMANIAN, DDS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
